personal.name: Bruno Maciel Servulo
personal.title: Dynamics 365 Technical Architect | Power Platform + Dataverse Specialist

professional_summary: Senior Dynamics 365 Technical Architect with 15+ years designing, building, and optimizing complex Microsoft solutions for enterprise, financial, industrial, and government clients. Specialized in Dataverse architecture, high-volume implementations, performance tuning, storage optimization, complex integrations, and delivering reliable, scalable platforms.
